Author: Ninethirty77
Name: The Studium
Description: Records observed Company Credits totals, shows weekly GC Seals tier progression, FC progress rings, an optional overlay, and a preview Studium Crafters workflow. Use /thestudium to open the window.
Changelog:
Studium Crafters dropdown polish:
- Opens the craft-set dropdown popup from the top instead of focusing the last selected row.
- Styles category headers in larger Studium gold text.
- Adds indentation and padding to gear set rows while preserving the selected-row highlight.
